description: You are a general practitioner working with MedinTux. Log in to MedinTux Manager using any practitioner account. Four patients have been flagged for medication safety issues: MARTIN Sophie (born 1985-03-22), BERNARD Pierre (born 1968-11-30), MOREAU Francois (born 1955-12-01), and LEROY Isabelle (born 1979-04-15). Resolve the specific medication safety issue for each patient by creating an updated prescription (ordonnance) and adding a consultation note documenting the corrective action and reasoning. Each patient has exactly one medication safety issue.

metadata.task_description: Polypharmacy medication safety review for 4 patients

MARTIN_Sophie.issue: Dual RAAS blockade: Ramipril (ACE inhibitor) + Valsartan (ARB) co-prescribed — contraindicated combination

BERNARD_Pierre.issue: NSAID allergy (IBUPROFENE Allergique in terrain) but Ibuprofene 400mg prescribed

MOREAU_Francois.issue: Duplicate beta-blockers: Atenolol 50mg AND Bisoprolol 5mg both active

LEROY_Isabelle.issue: Metformin 850mg prescribed despite severe chronic renal insufficiency (DFG < 30 ml/min) documented in terrain — absolute contraindication
